title: avena strigosa subvar. minor
intro: Avena strigosa subvar. minor, also known as the 'small oat grass', is a plant species within the Avena genus, belonging to the Poaceae family of grasses. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and soothing effects on the digestive system. The health benefits of Avena strigosa subvar. minor are said to include relaxation, stress relief, and improved sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often recommended for their calming and restorative effects.
